<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>在时限内触碰<Color=red>所有的光<Color=white>

如果<Color=red>手放开了<Color=white>握着的操纵杆，

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>在時限內觸碰<Color=red>所有的光<Color=white>，

不過一旦<Color=red>鬆手<Color=white>放開操縱桿，
或是<Color=red>太過偏離賽道<Color=white>都會失去資格！
規則都彙整到桌上的書裡頭了，
之後再去看看吧。

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:8}せいげん>制限<Ruby={6:10}じかんない>時間内に<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}すべ>全ての<Ruby={2:6}ひかり>光<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:2}ふ>触れて

<Color=red>コースから<Ruby={2:4}はず>外れすぎ<Color=white>たら <Ruby={4:8}しっかく>失格よ

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>If you <Color=red>touch all the lights<Color=white> and get back
here within the time limit, you win.

But <Color=red>take your hands off<Color=white> the steering stick
once you've grabbed it or <Color=red>go too far off
course<Color=white>, and I have to disqualify you.
The rules are in the book on the desk if
you care to check it out later.

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>I'm happy to explain as many times as you
need, so ask away!

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>I don't want you to waste that <Color=red><unk[2:15:50 67 105 114 99 117 105 116 95 73 99 104 105 107 97 114 97 95 80 97 121 82 117 112 101 101 65535 52480]> rupee<Color=white>
entry fee.

So if there's anything you don't get,
now's your chance to clear it up.

<unk[3:0:260]>Ah no! <unk[5:0]>It seems you don't have enough
rupees. <unk[5:0]>Secure <Color=red><unk[2:15:50 67 105 114 99 117 105 116 95 73 99 104 105 107 97 114 97 95 80 97 121 82 117 112 101 101 65535 52480]> rupees<Color=white>, and then let's
have you challenge the course.

rows.USen: <unk[3:0:264]>All right, let's get started right away!

course is...<unk[5:1]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 48]>那么，我预先讲一下规则！<unk[5:0]><PageBreak>新手赛道的时限是
<Color=red>2分<Color=white>整！
在时限内触碰<Color=red>所有的光<Color=white>
并返回此处就算成功。
如果<Color=red>手放开了<Color=white>握着的操纵杆，

那么，<unk[5:0]>请就位……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 48]>保險起見，我先解說規則！<unk[5:0]><PageBreak>初級賽道的時限是
分秒不差的<Color=red>2分鐘<Color=white>！
只要能在時限內碰到<Color=red>所有的光<Color=white>
並回到這裡就算成功。

ジャスト<Color=red>2<Ruby={2:4}ふん>分<Color=white>！
それまでに<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}すべ>全ての<Ruby={2:6}ひかり>光<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:2}ふ>触れて
ここまで<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻ってくることができれば <Ruby={4:8}せいこう>成功
<Ruby={6:10}いちどにぎ>一度握った<Ruby={6:14}そうじゅうかん>操縦桿から<Color=red><Ruby={2:2}て>手を<Ruby={2:4}はな>離したり<Color=white>
<Color=red>コースから<Ruby={2:4}はず>外れすぎ<Color=white>たら <Ruby={4:8}しっかく>失格よ

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 48]>Now I'm going to explain the rules, just
to make sure they've sunk in.<PageBreak>The time limit for the beginner course
is <Color=red>2 minutes<Color=white> exactly.

You want to touch <Color=red>all the lights<Color=white> and get
back here within that time, OK?

If you <Color=red>take your hands off<Color=white> the steering
stick once you've grabbed it or <Color=red>go too
far off course<Color=white>, you're disqualified.
Understand?<unk[5:0]> Good. <unk[5:0]>Now, on your marks...

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Let's see... The switch for the expert
course is...<unk[5:1]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 48]>我先来讲一下规则！<PageBreak>高手赛道的时限是
<Color=red>3分钟<Color=white>！
在时限内触碰<Color=red>所有的光<Color=white>
并返回此处就算成功。
如果<Color=red>手放开了<Color=white>握着的操纵杆，
或是<Color=red>冲出了赛道<Color=white>，就算失去资格。
那么，<unk[5:0]>就位……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 48]>我先解說規則！<PageBreak>進階賽道的時限是
<Color=red>3分鐘<Color=white>！
只要能在時限內<Color=red>碰到所有的光<Color=white>
並回到這裡就算成功。
一旦<Color=red>放開<Color=white>手裡握著的操縱桿，

<Color=red>3<Ruby={2:4}ぷん>分<Color=white>！

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 48]>Let me just go over the rules.<PageBreak>The time to beat on the expert course
is <Color=red>3 minutes<Color=white>.

If you <Color=red>touch each and every light <Color=white>and get
back here before the timer runs out,
you win!
But <Color=red>don't let go <Color=white>of the steering stick once
you've grabbed it, and <Color=red>don't go too far off
course<Color=white>. Now, <unk[5:0]>on your marks...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>多么引人入胜的驾驶！<unk[5:0]>
而且还刷新了纪录！<unk[5:0]>恭喜！
我收集到了有意义的数据，
这是给你的谢礼！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>真是迷人的英姿！<unk[5:0]>
而且還刷新了記錄！<unk[5:0]>恭喜你！
你讓我收集到很棒的資料，
這個是送你的謝禮！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>ほれぼれする <Ruby={2:4}はし>走りだったわ！<unk[5:0]>
しかも<Ruby={4:6}きろく>記録<Ruby={4:8}こうしん>更新！ <unk[5:0]>おめでとう！
これはいいデータを<Ruby={2:2}と>取らせてもらった
お<Ruby={2:4}れい>礼よ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>That was some admirable driving.<unk[5:0]>
Not only that, you set a new record!<unk[5:0]>
Congratulations!
I have to thank you for helping me gather
such high-quality driving data. Here...

rows.CNzh:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>恭喜！<PageBreak><Size=100>没想到你真的通过了高手赛道，<Size=125><Size=100><unk[5:0]>
真不愧是帕弗宇认可的伯伊！<unk[5:0]>
这是你首次通过高手赛道的
纪念品哦！
rows.TWzh:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>恭喜！<PageBreak><Size=100>想不到你真的通過了進階賽道，<Size=125><Size=100><unk[5:0]>

rows.JPja:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>おめでとう！<PageBreak><Size=100><Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に <Ruby={6:16}じょうきゅうしゃ>上級者コースをクリアしちゃうなんて<Size=125><Size=100><unk[5:0]>

<Ruby={6:10}きねんひん>記念品よ！
rows.USen:
<Size=125><unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Congratulations!<PageBreak><Size=100>I can't believe you cleared the expert
course. <Size=125><Size=100><unk[5:0]>I should have expected as much
from a voe Tali respects!
Here, please, I want you to have this
memento for beating the expert course
for the first time!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>不过，你的行李……<unk[5:0]>
怎么塞得满满当当啊？
<unk[3:0:264]>我可是精心为你准备了
<Color=red>大的左纳乌能源<Color=white>，
你得好好收下才行啊！<PageBreak>能请你整理好行李再来找我吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>原本是這麼想啦……
但是你的行李……<unk[5:0]>有點滿呢？
<unk[3:0:264]>我可是特地準備了
<Color=red>大的左納烏能源<Color=white>，
請你一定要收下！<PageBreak>可以請你整理好行李後再來嗎？

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>と<Ruby={2:4}おも>思ったけど…
アナタの<Ruby={4:6}にもつ>荷物… <unk[5:0]>いっぱいじゃない？
<unk[3:0:264]>せっかく
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}おお>大きなゾナウエネルギー<Color=white>を <Ruby={4:6}ようい>用意したんだから
ちゃんと <Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取ってもらわないと！<PageBreak><Ruby={8:12}にもつせいり>荷物整理してから また<Ruby={2:2}き>来てくれる？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>Ah, I see...<unk[5:0]> You don't have room to

<unk[3:0:264]>Well, since I went to the trouble of

you have no choice but to accept it!<PageBreak>Just come back after you've made some
room for it among your things.

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>我原本是這麼想的……

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>Ah, I see...<unk[5:0]> You don't have room, do you?

have no choice but to accept them!<PageBreak>Just come back after you've made some
room for them among your things.
